content:
- [Reanimated v4 + worklets Metro fix](feedback_reanimated_v4_expo_fix.md) — Fix for "Cannot find module babel-preset-expo" with react-native-worklets in Expo; also covers stale Metro port + NativeWind tailwindcss@3 requirement
- [Charm City Nights project context](project_charm_city_nights.md) — Stack, design tokens, backend status for the Baltimore nightlife app

name: Reanimated v4 + react-native-worklets Metro fix for Expo
description: How to fix "Cannot find module babel-preset-expo" when using react-native-reanimated v4 + react-native-worklets in an Expo project
type: feedback
---

When using `react-native-reanimated@4.x` + `react-native-worklets@0.8.x` in an Expo project, the Metro bundler throws:
`node_modules/react-native-worklets/src/memory/bundleUnpacker.native.ts: Cannot find module 'babel-preset-expo'`

**Why:** `react-native-worklets` sets it

name: Charm City Nights — project context
description: Key facts about the Charm City Nights mobile app project
type: project
---

Baltimore nightlife app. Monorepo at `~/charm-city-nights/` with `mobile/` (Expo) and `backend/` (Node/Prisma on port 3000).

**Mobile stack:** Expo SDK ~54.0.33, React Native 0.81.5, expo-router ~6.0.23, react-native-reanimated ^4.3.0, react-native-worklets ^0.8.1, NativeWind (tailwindcss@3), newArchEnabled: true, bundleId: com.gabe.charmcitynights

**Design system:
File unknown was edited 47 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
